author: Lucas Ercolano
name: Faithful KV-cache Quantization Backends (1x3090)
blurb: Non-record local study on 1x RTX 3090 adding a teacher-forced autoregressive KV-cache evaluator plus QJL, PolarQuant, and TurboQuant-inspired backends to a baseline Parameter Golf model. Best quantized local capped result: Polar backend at 1.98346882 val_bpb on a 2048-token evaluation cap, with a 10.46MB compressed artifact.
